name: IPv6 Address
description: Detects IPv6 addresses in standard and compressed notation (e.g., 2001:0db8:85a3:0000:0000:8a2e:0370:7334, ::1). GDPR personal data. SSH MD5 fingerprints (aa:bb:cc:dd:...) have the same syntactic form but are excluded via first-group length requirement.

metadata.note: GDPR considers IP addresses as personal data. Documentation prefix 2001:db8::/32 is not rejected (no ipv6_scope validator yet — unlike ipv4_scope which rejects private/loopback/documentation).
metadata.pattern_rationale: Full 8-group arm changed to require first group {3,4} chars instead of {1,4}. SSH MD5 fingerprints use all-2-char groups (aa:bb:cc:dd:ee:ff:00:11) which matched the original {1,4} pattern. Real IPv6 global-unicast and link-local addresses start with 4-char groups (2001, fe80, fc00, etc.). Compressed arms (::X, X::Y) are unaffected.

effect.message: IPv6 address tokenized (GDPR), network prefix visible for de-identification
